description:
Cross-platform desktop application for translation based on ChatGPT API.


v0.6.19
- Fix excessive idle CPU usage in WebView2 on Windows since 0.6.16. The writing-indicator HUD and Quick Translator panel are pre-created as hidden windows at startup; the HUD ran infinite CSS animations from launch (even while in the system tray) and the Quick Translator eagerly ran its context picker. Both now stay fully idle until actually shown (#1883).
